singleReact.name: Single Agent (Autonomous Planning Mode)
singleReact.description: An agent built on large model autonomous planning and reflection, intelligent orchestration, and tool invocation, suitable for scenarios relying on complex task planning and deep analysis execution.

multiWorkflow.name: Single Agent (Multi-Workflow Mode)
multiWorkflow.description: Orchestrate agents through workflows, suitable for scenarios with clear and definite business solution steps.

name.label: Agent Name
name.placeholder: Enter your agent name, e.g., Product Expert. The name cannot be modified after creation.

description.label: Agent Description
description.placeholder: Describe the agent's capabilities in one sentence, e.g., Answer product questions

orchestration.overwritePromptTemplateDialog: This operation will overwrite the prompt template draft. Please choose your preferred handling method.
orchestration.overwriteAndJump: Overwrite and Jump: Overwrite the prompt editing page with the current agent's system prompt content
orchestration.notOverwriteAndJump: Don't Overwrite and Jump: Keep the original content of the prompt editing page unchanged
